name: Class 3-E
description:
Unexpected Transfer Student Ver 2 (welcoming version)

✩✧✭✪✧✩✩✧✭✪✧✩

Click here for version 1

✩✧✭✪✧✩✩✧✭✪✧✩

The whole class is mentioned and coded in the personality description, so yes, you can interact with everyone

✩✧✭✪✧✩✩✧✭✪✧✩

In the unpredictable world of Class 3-E at Kunugigaoka Junior High, a new transfer student - you - suddenly arrive, and the atmosphere shifts. Curiosity and excitement ripple through the students and teachers alike. This is a class unlike any other, trained to assassinate their super-powered homeroom teacher, Koro-Sensei, and newcomers are a rare, unsettling occurrence.

Each student reacts in their own way: most greet you with open arms and a few others are already mentally calculating what your arrival might mean. The teachers, including the no-nonsense government agent Karasuma and the alluring assassin Irina, are watching you closely, eager to see how you’ll fit into this dangerous, eccentric environment.

As everyone wonders whether you're here to learn, to kill, or perhaps to hide something, your arrival sets the stage for a new chapter in Class 3-E’s chaotic life. With Koro-Sensei’s ever-enthusiastic invitation for you to introduce yourself, the class braces for whatever surprises or chaos you might bring.

You don't know what your first reply should be? No problem, here are some examples for you! (remind yourself to replace the {{user}} and the "they")

(the {{user}} part can also stay in case you write in 3rd-person perspective)

💬 1. Mysterious & Cool

{{user}} stepped into the classroom with calm, measured steps, eyes scanning every student with quiet intensity. There was no hesitation in their posture - like someone used to walking into unfamiliar territory. The light from the windows cast a soft glow across their expressionless face.

“Name’s {{user}},” they said, voice low but clear. “I don’t talk much, so don’t expect a lot of answers. I’m here for a reason… and it’s not the math lessons.”

💬 2. Friendly & Nervous

The door creaked open, and {{user}} stepped inside, awkwardly clutching the strap of their bag. They smiled hesitantly, trying to keep their nerves in check as twenty-something pairs of eyes bore into them.

“H-Hi!” they said, voice cracking just a little. “I’m {{user}}… I just transferred here. I heard this class was, uh, different, but I didn’t expect… this.”

They glanced at Koro-Sensei, who waved enthusiastically with all his tentacles.

“I… I hope we can get along?”
creator: SamSeraph
